004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.micrometer;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022
023import java.time.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.*;
026
027import io.micrometer.core.instrument.*;
028
029/**
030 * {@link MetricsRecorder} bridge that records every {@code @RestOp} call as a Micrometer
031 * {@link Timer} sample on the configured {@link MeterRegistry}.
032 *
033 * <h5 class='topic'>Metric shape</h5>
034 *
035 * <p>
036 * Each call records to one Timer named (by default) {@value #DEFAULT_TIMER_NAME} with four tags:
037 * <ul>
038 *    <li><b>{@code method}</b> &mdash; uppercased HTTP method (e.g. {@code GET}, {@code POST}).
039 *    <li><b>{@code uri}</b> &mdash; the {@code @RestOp} path template (e.g. {@code /users/{id}}), not
040 *       the raw concrete URI. Using the template keeps tag cardinality bounded; raw URIs
041 *       ({@code /users/123}, {@code /users/124}, ...) would explode the registry's series count.
042 *       Empty string when the operation has no path pattern.
043 *    <li><b>{@code status}</b> &mdash; HTTP response status code as a string (e.g. {@code 200},
044 *       {@code 404}, {@code 500}).
045 *    <li><b>{@code exception}</b> &mdash; the thrown exception's simple-name (e.g. {@code BadRequest},
046 *       {@code NullPointerException}), or {@value #NO_EXCEPTION_TAG} when the call completed normally.
047 * </ul>
048 *
049 * <p>
050 * The shape mirrors Spring Boot's
051 * <a class="doclink" href="https://docs.spring.io/spring-boot/docs/current/reference/htmlsingle/#actuator.metrics.supported.spring-mvc">{@code WebMvcMetricsFilter}</a>
052 * convention so existing dashboards / alerts that scrape {@code http.server.requests} from Spring
053 * Boot services keep working when those services are reimplemented on Juneau.
054 *
055 * <h5 class='topic'>Wiring</h5>
056 *
057 * <p class='bjava'>
058 *    <ja>@Configuration</ja>
059 *    <jk>public class</jk> ObservabilityConfig {
060 *
061 *       <ja>@Bean</ja>
062 *       <jk>public</jk> MeterRegistry meterRegistry() {
063 *          <jk>return new</jk> PrometheusMeterRegistry(PrometheusConfig.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>);
064 *       }
065 *
066 *       <ja>@Bean</ja>
067 *       <jk>public</jk> MetricsRecorder metricsRecorder(MeterRegistry <jv>r</jv>) {
068 *          <jk>return new</jk> MicrometerMetricsRecorder(<jv>r</jv>);
069 *       }
070 *    }
071 * </p>
072 *
073 * <p>
074 * The {@code MetricsRecorder} bean is picked up by {@code juneau-rest-server} through the
075 * {@code RestContext}'s bean store and invoked once per {@code @RestOp} call.
076 *
077 * <h5 class='topic'>Customizing the metric name</h5>
078 *
079 * <p>
080 * Pass a non-default name to the two-arg constructor when the default
081 * {@value #DEFAULT_TIMER_NAME} doesn't match an existing dashboard / Prometheus rule set:
082 *
083 * <p class='bjava'>
084 *    <jk>new</jk> MicrometerMetricsRecorder(<jv>r</jv>, <js>"my.service.http.timer"</js>)
085 * </p>
086 *
087 * <p>
088 * Per-operation overrides are available via {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestOp#metricName()}.
089 * When a non-empty {@code metricName} is passed to {@code record(...)}, it takes precedence over the
090 * recorder-level timer name. Per-op tags added via {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestOp#metricTags()}
091 * are merged into the standard tag set as additional {@code key=value} pairs.
092 *
093 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
094 *    <li class='jc'>{@link MetricsRecorder}
095 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/RestServerObservability">REST Server &mdash; Observability (Micrometer + OpenTelemetry)</a>
096 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://micrometer.io/docs/concepts">Micrometer Concepts</a>
097 * </ul>
098 *
099 * @since 10.0.0
100 */
101@SuppressWarnings({
102   "java:S115" // TAG_xxx and ARG_xxx constants use camelCase after prefix intentionally (metric/arg key names, not enum-style constants)
103})
104public class MicrometerMetricsRecorder implements MetricsRecorder {
105
106   /** Default timer name {@code "http.server.requests"} &mdash; matches Spring Boot's convention. */
107   public static final String DEFAULT_TIMER_NAME = "http.server.requests";
108
109   /** Tag value used for the {@code exception} tag when the call completed normally. */
110   public static final String NO_EXCEPTION_TAG = "None";
111
112   private static final String TAG_METHOD = "method";
113   private static final String TAG_URI = "uri";
114   private static final String TAG_STATUS = "status";
115   private static final String TAG_EXCEPTION = "exception";
116
117   private static final String ARG_registry = "registry";
118   private static final String ARG_timerName = "timerName";
119
120   private final MeterRegistry registry;
121   private final String timerName;
122
123   /**
124    * Constructor using the default timer name {@value #DEFAULT_TIMER_NAME}.
125    *
126    * @param registry The Micrometer {@link MeterRegistry} to publish timers to. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
127    */
128   public MicrometerMetricsRecorder(MeterRegistry registry) {
129      this(registry, DEFAULT_TIMER_NAME);
130   }
131
132   /**
133    * Constructor with a custom timer name.
134    *
135    * @param registry The Micrometer {@link MeterRegistry} to publish timers to. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
136    * @param timerName The timer name. Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
137    */
138   public MicrometerMetricsRecorder(MeterRegistry registry, String timerName) {
139      this.registry = assertArgNotNull(ARG_registry, registry);
140      this.timerName = assertArgNotNullOrBlank(ARG_timerName, timerName);
141   }
142
143   /**
144    * Returns the {@link MeterRegistry} this recorder publishes to.
145    *
146    * @return The {@link MeterRegistry}.
147    */
148   public MeterRegistry getRegistry() { return registry; }
149
150   /**
151    * Returns the configured timer name.
152    *
153    * @return The timer name.
154    */
155   public String getTimerName() { return timerName; }
156
157   @SuppressWarnings({
158      "java:S6213" // Method name 'record' is part of the established MetricsRecorder SPI; renaming this overriding method would be a breaking API change.
159   })
160   @Override /* MetricsRecorder */
161   public void record(String opName, String httpMethod, String uriTemplate, int statusCode, Duration elapsed, Throwable error, String metricName, String metricTags) {
162      var effectiveName = ne(metricName) ? metricName : timerName;
163      var builder = Timer.builder(effectiveName)
164         .tag(TAG_METHOD, defaultIfBlank(httpMethod, ""))
165         .tag(TAG_URI, defaultIfBlank(uriTemplate, ""))
166         .tag(TAG_STATUS, Integer.toString(statusCode))
167         .tag(TAG_EXCEPTION, exceptionTag(error));
168      builder = applyMetricTags(builder, metricTags);
169      builder.register(registry).record(elapsed);
170   }
171
172   @SuppressWarnings({
173      "java:S6213" // Method name 'record' is part of the established MetricsRecorder SPI; renaming this overriding method would be a breaking API change.
174   })
175   @Override /* MetricsRecorder */
176   public void record(String metricName, String metricTags, Duration elapsed, Throwable error) {
177      // Custom (non-request) observation: a timer named metricName carrying only the exception tag
178      // plus any caller-supplied metricTags - no HTTP method/uri/status tags (there is no request).
179      var builder = Timer.builder(metricName)
180         .tag(TAG_EXCEPTION, exceptionTag(error));
181      builder = applyMetricTags(builder, metricTags);
182      builder.register(registry).record(elapsed);
183   }
184
185   private static Timer.Builder applyMetricTags(Timer.Builder builder, String metricTags) {
186      if (ne(metricTags))
187         for (var pair : metricTags.split(",")) {
188            var kv = pair.split("=", 2);
189            if (kv.length == 2)
190               builder = builder.tag(kv[0].strip(), kv[1].strip());
191         }
192      return builder;
193   }
194
195   private static String exceptionTag(Throwable error) {
196      return error == null ? NO_EXCEPTION_TAG : cns(error);
197   }
198
199   private static String defaultIfBlank(String value, String fallback) {
200      return isEmpty(value) ? fallback : value;
201   }
202}
